---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

```bash
# Minimal command that triggers the bug
constrictor scan /path/to/project -o graph.json
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Constrictor version (`constrictor --version`):
- Installation method (source / pip):

## Additional context

Any other context, e.g. project structure, relevant code snippets.
